name: PR Review
tagline: Guidelines and gh/GitHub-MCP scripts for reviewing Angular PRs locally or remotely, with a checklist and consent gate before posting.
verdict: Well-structured, actionable review workflow with script fallbacks, duplicate-comment avoidance, and a hard consent gate before posting to PRs (resists fake 'auto-approved' bypass attempts). Weak spots: no negative-trigger scoping, non-kebab-case name field, no versioning signal, and local mode edits files beyond what the terse description implies.

highlights.summary: Local mode 'apply the edits directly to the files' (uncommitted) isn't disclosed by the terse description 'Guidelines and tools for reviewing pull requests'.
No 'NOT for' / out-of-scope exclusions anywhere in the description or body.
name: PR Review — spaces and capitals, fails ^[a-z0-9]+(-[a-z0-9]+)*$.
